intro: I'm Raghav Dabra, based in <ImageMelbourne>Melbourne</ImageMelbourne>, a Software Engineer specializing in AI, Data Engineering, and Cybersecurity.

2+ years
of enterprise experience at Bank of America owning production systems.
Currently pursuing a Master of Software Engineering at the <ImageUniMelb>University of Melbourne</ImageUniMelb>, focusing on ML, Cloud Architecture, and Database Systems.
I've built AI-powered systems using Anthropic Claude API, LangChain, and Cursor AI. Recognized with 1× Silver Award and 4× Bronze Awards for production excellence.
Today I think in Python, TypeScript, and AI-first architectures.
clan: At Bank of America, I owned critical 4BD/6BD monthly financial production cycles for EMBS, orchestrating 5+ concurrent batch pipelines across 4 distributed database systems with zero SLA breaches.
I built Python automation scripts that reduced critical cycle processing time by ~40%, eliminating recurring manual validation overhead across global financial reporting systems.
Recognized with 1× Silver Award for preventing potential global market disruption and 4× Bronze Awards for production stability and CRQ excellence.
Holds 7× IBM Cybersecurity certifications and has led penetration testing engagements identifying 12+ critical vulnerabilities across enterprise web applications.
method: Building scalable systems requires more than just code—it demands understanding of distributed systems, data pipelines, and production governance.
I specialize in full-stack development, Python automation, and AI integration.
I emphasize Agile methodologies, TDD, and continuous improvement for myself and teams.
If production excellence and technical innovation come on top of that, it is the ultimate satisfaction.
